Team,

You may have heard that the vote on the GOP's health care bill has been postponed -- but that doesn't mean it's time to get complacent.

**In fact, with a vote coming after recess, it makes today 's #FightTrumpcare Day of action more important than ever.**

Across the country today, grassroots Democrats are fighting the GOP's disastrous health care bill by holding house parties, making their voices heard on social media, and speaking out to oppose the GOP's disastrous health care bill.

**Here are 3 easy ways to join us (and to ask your friends to speak out too!):**

[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e42e/2b07114c/2423ebe8/73100717/2026921174/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/the-fight-for-2018?source=PT-20170627-ActionAlertDS-ProsHV") [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e42e/2b07114c/2423ebe8/73100716/2026921174/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/dialog/feed?app_id=966242223397117&link=https://youtu.be/Ju3K9bqPTeM&picture=&name=The%20vote%20on%20%23Trumpcare%20could%20happen%20any%20day%20now.%20Watch%20and%20SHARE%20to%20show%20what%27s%20at%20stake:%20&caption=%20&description=&redirect_uri=http://www.facebook.com/&display=popup")[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e42e/2b07114c/2423ebe8/73100711/2026921174/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=The%20vote%20on%20%23Trumpcare%20could%20happen%20any%20day%20now.%20Watch%20%26%20RT%20%40dscc%20ad%20to%20show%20what%27s%20at%20stake%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FJu3K9bqPTeM&source=webclient")
**As Senators head home for recess this weekend NOW is the time to speak out and say no to Obamacare repeal -- and to make sure your friends and neighbors are speaking out as well!**

Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans' Obamacare repeal bill would leave 22 million Americans out in the cold without health care coverage and would slash Medicaid. We can't sit this one out.

We need to make our voices heard, because this is a fight worth fighting.

Thanks for being a part of the fight,

Team DSCC

name: Leila McDowell, EMILY's List
subject: Health care vote delayed (but still shady) >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b72/24c69fd9/d58af343/18e72aca/2869998578/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE638N_digital_email_20170627_SenRush_inact&source=WQEFE638N_digital_email_20170627_SenRush_inact")
---

Peter,

HUGE NEWS: Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell delayed the vote on Trumpcare.

This is a critical victory, but a delay doesn't mean this cruel and heartless bill is gone for good. Here's a reminder of how shady the Senate GOP has been since the House passed the health care debate over to them:

First, McConnell formed a group of 13 men and ZERO women to draft a Senate version of Trumpcare. Shady.

Next, they insisted on drafting the bill in secret, blocking Democrats and the public from the process. Extra shady.

Then, after promising to put forward something completely new and better than the House version, Republican senators just repackaged what the House had already passed. SO much shadiness.

After FINALLY releasing the bill, they tried to rush it through the Senate without hearings or a detailed debate. When Democrats passed Obamacare, the full Senate debated it for nearly a month. If Republicans follow through with their plans to use a special legislative process to pass the bill with 51 votes instead of 60, Trumpcare won't get more than ONE FULL DAY of debate.

Republicans are clearly scared of moving this highly unpopular and incredibly dangerous bill. If we want to stop Trumpcare for good, we need to send a message that a vote for Trumpcare will cost you your seat.

**Donate $3 before June is over to help raise the $250,000 we need to challenge any shady and shameless Republicans who would vote to take health insurance from 22 million people just to give the rich another tax break:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-Our-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b72/24c69fd9/d58af343/18e72acb/2869998578/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170626_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachOurGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE638N_digital_email_20170627_SenRush_inact&source=WQEFE638N_digital_email_20170627_SenRush_inact")**

Thanks,

Leila McDowell
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

name: JC Hernandez
subject: Love the internet?
body:
---
| | | | [ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f07e3b3e3f8b53c4126ed97f8d44d483be4db9b7028c32ed42505f1e68446e539c420e18ef9426d2a96954694cb9ed64821e0caef628430c)
---
| | | | Peter,

Love the internet? Love freedom?
_Then I have some exciting news for you!_
**FCC Chairman Ajit Pai has been confirmed as our keynote speaker for this year's[Defending the American Dream Summit](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f07e3b3e3f8b53c4ddecb7c67109306ea6b2041539ad44cb069bee49035fc1626bb0311e3851c946efd20bb1ce4c949da1b3c1fe51b85689 "Defending the American Dream Summit") in Richmond.**
[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f07e3b3e3f8b53c4436d8714c036735ff14db1d280220f2e6937c60ab1ba5d19d9ccafed23b0c070cc3da5df5c25cab022b0110b989a645c)
Chairman Pai has been a champion of free-market ideas and an unfettered internet, and is now leading the charge to repeal harmful Obama -era regulations. _
"People want better, faster and cheaper internet, so we are looking at what FCC policies can best deliver on that promise. The free markets that we all believe in will deliver value for American consumers, so we are starting conversations to get rid of these regulations." - _FCC Chairman Ajit Pai
Along with Chairman Pai, the 11th annual Defending the American Dream Summit will also feature Virginia House Speaker-Designee Kirk Cox, who will discuss his vision for tax reform in 2017 and beyond.**
Space is limited - don't wait to register!** [Reserve your ticket now](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f07e3b3e3f8b53c4e05eee22e2160c4acd1f11a0c1ecbfd5cd99fc82d621c2eec28f18db5595e1ce07e8a5d49ed9a72c8c673c7cd66cfeae "Reserve your ticket now").
Every year, the Defending the American Dream Summit brings together freedom-loving activists and grassroots volunteers from around the country.At this year's Defending the American Dream Summit, you will:
* Hear from leading policy experts.
* Sharpen your grassroots advocacy skills.
* Network with like-minded peers.
* Learn from some of the most prominent thought leaders in the conservative movement.

[ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f07e3b3e3f8b53c43e15b969661312f3081c2db0ecf97564834388caf303ca87c916837fc33c05ef52ef911f826c7c16c50479d87f7a178b)
**WHAT: 11th Annual Defending the American Dream Summit** **
WHERE:** Richmond Marriott Downtown,500 East Broad St. Richmond, VA 23219**
WHEN:** Saturday, August 19th, 2017 [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f07e3b3e3f8b53c43e15b969661312f3081c2db0ecf97564834388caf303ca87c916837fc33c05ef52ef911f826c7c16c50479d87f7a178b)
This is one summit you won't want to miss! I hope you will join me in Richmond this August.
In Liberty,
JC HernandezState DirectorAmericans for Prosperity - Virginia _
P.S. We only have a limited number of tickets left and we expect to run out soon! Don't wait -- [**register today**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f07e3b3e3f8b53c4471f30672486a2fd9698da0d0e1e3bb3c8182b667bed0bca257377054360bd09a575ad57255e5ba2e04bf44353376232 "register today")._

**
My Faith Matters LIVE**
[ A Conversation with Jim Garlow](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43027692:srA97R2ON:m:1:876315805:EFA954BDB0F69B1961C412905083FF2F:r)
**Date:** June 30TH
3PM Eastern | 2PM Central | 1PM Mountain | 12PM Pacific

** _" ...when we hear the word political, we shut our Bibles and recoil, as if God has no interest in government, in spite of the fact that it was God who first invented it." _
~ Dr. Jim Garlow
**
**
**Is there a biblical response to the Health Care Bill? What about Tax Reform? Most Christians struggle to answer this. But you don 't have to!

Even though you are bombarded daily with messages from the liberal mainstream media which are at odds with the Word of God, you can have biblical clarity on the tough issues of the day.

You're invited to [join our live conversation with Dr. Garlow](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43027692:srA97R2ON:m:1:876315805:EFA954BDB0F69B1961C412905083FF2F:r), ask questions, and learn about these critical and timely topics affecting our liberties and religious freedom.

Dr. Garlow offers engaging, biblical answers to our most pressing cultural questions. Pastor Jim Garlow is the senior pastor of Skyline Church in San Diego and is heard daily on over 850 radio outlets in a one minute commentary called "The Garlow Perspective," has done over 1,200 interviews in print, radio and TV, and has authored 15 books on theological, historical, and cultural matters.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43027692:srA97R2ON:m:1:876315805:EFA954BDB0F69B1961C412905083FF2F:r)

When you join, you'll learn how you can receive a copy of Dr. Garlow's latest book, "Well Versed: Biblical Answers to Today's Tough Issues" as a gift from us.
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43027692:srA97R2ON:m:1:876315805:EFA954BDB0F69B1961C412905083FF2F:r)

If you've already registered, no further action is needed. If you haven't registered yet, [please do so today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43027692:srA97R2ON:m:1:876315805:EFA954BDB0F69B1961C412905083FF2F:r), and then we'll call you on Friday. We look forward to sharing our vision for victory with you next week!

This free event is a resource provided by My Faith Votes to understand our current political and cultural climate, as well as provide information you need to be empowered as advocates for religious freedom, life, family and compassion in your own community.

**My Faith Matters LIVE** shows are streamed live over the Internet at [MyFaithVotes.org,](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43027692:srA97R2ON:m:1:876315805:EFA954BDB0F69B1961C412905083FF2F:r) or if you are on the move, [sign up for our interactive call](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/43027692:srA97R2ON:m:1:876315805:EFA954BDB0F69B1961C412905083FF2F:r) and listen on your phone.

1600 Daily Everything White House for 6/28/2017. |
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=055824b54b02711ef0d573871bbce2588f187e3462e01dc24f6c3a3f836fbe76f6ebdcddb665247a4f0dbe04293a8b809d4cf9e650fe335a

Families across our nation are suffering under the disaster known as Obamacare. Millions of hard-working Americans have been impaired by soaring costs, cancelled plans, and overbearing mandates. Obamacare is a disaster and must be repealed and replaced. President Donald J. Trump and his Administration continue to work with Congress to provide a healthcare system that the American people deserve.

Today's Events

10:30 AM: President Trump receives his daily intelligence briefing

11:30 AM: President Trump leads a tribal, State, and local energy roundtable

1:30 PM: Press Briefing with Principal Deputy Press Secretary Sarah Sanders and officials from Department of Justice and Immigration and Customs Enforcement

2:00 PM: President Trump participates in a meet and greet with the Chicago Cubs

3:00 PM: President Trump meets with immigration crime victims

3:50 PM: Vice President Pence participates in a Healthcare Listening Session with Small Business Owners in Cleveland, Ohio

4:45 PM: Vice President Pence delivers remarks at Tendon Manufacturing, Inc.
in Cleveland, Ohio

body:

Wanted to flag this email, everyone, because thanks to you making your voice heard, Mitch McConnell postponed the vote on this dangerous bill.
This is good news, but the decision to delay does not change the fact that **if this bill passes, wealthy Americans and corporate special interests could receive enormous tax breaks while 22 million more people, including families like yours, lose access to critical health coverage.**
Senator Hassan is fighting her heart out to stop this bill, but she needs to know that you still have her back.
[**For some of us this is literally life or death, so please add your name to stand strong against Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and their dangerous health care plan.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdefe/2a380d31/1802888b/fea7da/2488649963/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170627_senate-protect-health?source=e20170627_CBOSign1-k_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you,
Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_

Hello,
Yesterday, the non-partisan Congressional Budget Office released their report on Senate Republicans' disgusting, dangerous health care bill.
It's worse than we thought. **Trumpcare would lead to higher costs and worse coverage -- and it would kick 22 MILLION hard-working Americans off of the insurance they rely on to get and stay healthy.**
Senator Hassan is working day and night to stop this bill and protect families like yours, but she needs to know that you're with her. [**Add your name to support Maggie Hassan and Senate Democrats in the fight to stop Trumpcare before it becomes law.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdefe/2a380d31/1802888b/fea7db/2488649963/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170627_senate-protect-health?source=e20170628_CBOSign1-k_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Mitch McConnell is expected to force this bill to a vote as early as Thursday, so we're running out of time to take action. Trumpcare is inches away from becoming law and devastating millions of families across New Hampshire and from coast to coast, so we can't afford for you to wait.
The time to act is now:
[**Put your name down to join Senator Hassan in the fight to save millions of lives and reject the Senate 's version of Trumpcare.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdefe/2a380d31/1802888b/fea7da/2488649963/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170627_senate-protect-health?source=e20170627_CBOSign1-k_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for being part of this,
Team Maggie

disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |

| I know how it feels to get that dreaded call from your doctor - that your worst fears have come true - that what you were hoping was nothing was actually cancer. Thankfully, in my case, it was caught early enough. I had the support and love of my family as well as access to treatments needed to fully recover.

In between treatments and tests, I was anxious and uncertain about the future. I didn't know what this would mean for my family, my health, and most importantly my children, who were 8 and 4 at the time I was diagnosed.

Figuring out how to pay for medical bills or deciding which treatments are the most affordable should be the last thing on a person's mind when they are in need of urgent care. Families shouldn't have to worry about bankruptcy or refinancing their home as they grapple with a loved one's health.

**Obamacare stopped insurers from refusing to cover those of us with pre-existing conditions. It also eliminated caps. But under Trumpcare, for millions of Americans, this dangerous and devastating health care bill introduced by Republicans will make health care less accessible and less affordable.**

[_**That 's why I want to hear from you - about what concerns you have with the Republican health care plan. Please, fill out this survey and share your concerns with me.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec7/622b7b5b/409b4eb/307bc523/3059488947/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170626am")

Thank you,

Debbie |

name: Keith Ellison
subject: re: 22,000,000 American lives
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care.
---
**Add your name: tell Senate Republicans we need to protect affordable health care.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-Republican-Health-Care-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170628_ke_nd&source=em_20170628_ke_nd")**

22,000,000, Derek.

That's how many American lives Senate Republicans were willing to put at risk by repealing the Affordable Care Act. And all to give the ultra-wealthy an unprecedented, massive tax cut.

To give you a sense of what "massive" looks like, the 400 richest families in the nation alone would get $33 billion in tax breaks -- the equivalent of the amount the federal government spends on the Medicaid expansion in Alaska, Arkansas, Nevada, and West Virginia, which covers about 725,000 people in total.

It's no wonder Republicans wrote this bill in secret, closed-door meetings and refused to hold any public meetings. It's an absolute disgrace.

Even though Republicans have decided to delay voting to repeal our health care for now, you can bet they'll be back after the July 4th recess.

**We can stop this thing, but only if we join together and make sure the GOP knows we won't stand for them taking away our health care. Join the hundreds of thousands of Democrats who've already signed on, and add your name to show the GOP they must reject the health care repeal:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-Republican-Health-Care-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170628_ke_nd&source=em_20170628_ke_nd")**
Thank you so much, Derek.

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233bb/4067b0a/35801e28f/7e6b0d4f/3371845531/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170628_ke_nd&source=em_20170628_ke_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Healthcare should be a human right
body:
#
Team --
Yesterday, Senator Mitch McConnell delayed the healthcare vote until after the Fourth of July holiday. Now, instead of celebrating our nation's independence, families across Florida will wait to learn the fate of their health insurance, and for many, their lives.
This is no way to live, and this is no way to treat people. We shouldn't have to worry constantly about losing our healthcare. And that's why I'm proud to announce our proposal for a Florida constitutional amendment to make affordable healthcare a fundamental right for all Floridians.
[**Become a citizen co-sponsor of this proposal by adding your name, right here, right now:**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32e9/9e00690/4d3e402e/24036403/1706698437/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/stand-up-for-florida-healthcare")
**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb32e9/9e00690/4d3e402e/24036403/1706698437/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/stand-up-for-florida-healthcare")**
Nearly 241 years ago, our nation's founding fathers signed their names to our Declaration of Independence, explaining that among our inalienable rights are life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. It's time for Florida to finally guarantee this inalienable right to life by enshrining healthcare as a right for all. There is a public trust for the government to care for its citizens, and our state can no longer be ambiguous about that moral obligation.
**When healthcare is under attack in Washington, we're going to lean into the challenge of healthcare in the Sunshine State and live our values.**
Bring it home,
Andrew

| | Peter,

Of course Mitch McConnell couldn't get a vote on his catastrophic health care bill before the July recess. It's hard to get support for a bill when you negotiate a proposal that takes away health care from 22 million people behind closed doors so that most of your members can't even see it.

It's even harder to get support when the actual bill turns out to be as bad as this one. Ripping coverage away from nearly 300,000 Hoosiers is a nonstarter. **Point blank, Joe refuses to vote for any bill that will take health care away from Hoosiers** , which is why McConnell and hard-line extremists in Washington would like nothing more than to unseat him -- we can't let that happen.

**[Will you pitch in $5 today to get us closer to our $30,000 goal and keep Joe in the Senate?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26fa/7377f838/36a7e1a4/51fb157d/3467258800/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-juneeoq?refcode=20170628nd&amount=10")**

This isn't over. This health care fight is just the first of many attacks we'll see on working people. And as long as President Trump's allies think they can pass legislation like this, they're going to keep trying. **Having someone like Joe fighting for Hoosiers in the Senate is more important than ever.** That's why we have to make sure Joe has the resources he needs to continue being an independent voice in Washington.

**[Chip in $5 today to get us closer to our goal of raising $30,000 before the end of June and sending Joe back to the Senate to fight for Hoosiers!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26fa/7377f838/36a7e1a4/51fb157d/3467258800/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-juneeoq?refcode=20170628nd&amount=10")**

subject: re: Double down now

body:
| __
As the great American philosopher Yogi Berra said, "It ain't over till it's over." It's good news that the Senate Republicans don't have the votes this week to pass their unconscionable Wealthcare bill. But this is no time for any kind of victory lap.

Over the next few weeks the Senate Republicans will redouble their efforts to try to repeal Obamacare after the July 4th break. You can be sure that Republican Senate Leader Mitch McConnell and President Trump will try every trick in the book to get the votes they need. That means we have to fight back even harder.

[**Add your name if you will join me in reaching out to friends and relatives around the country to urge them to keep the pressure on and demand their senators withhold support for this reckless bill.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bc5/70cdc2ba/47735d99/397c635/1160769579/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/signcvh?refcode=em062817&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+if+you+will+join+me+in+rea&utm_campaign=em062817&source=em062817")

I agreed to lead the Democratic Senate Campaign Committee (DSCC) because I believe in our mission of supporting leaders who want to take America forward, not take a U-turn on the progress we have made. Every Democratic senator is opposed to this disastrous GOP bill. I need your help to make sure that the 25 Democratic senators who are up for election in 2018 have all the support and resources it takes to win.

Make no mistake: We need to keep up the fight everyday and everywhere. That's why I need your help right now.

**Friday is our FIRST Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline since the Senate Republicans unveiled their immoral bill. Let's show that we will pull out all the stops to block this bill. And let's show that we will support our class of 2018 which is holding the Blue Line in the U.S. Senate. Our goal is to raise another $45,000 to send a clear message that we are standing firm. And that means starting right now.

| Dear Peter,
Earning the Republican nomination for Lieutenant Governor has been one of the greatest honors of my life. Virginia faces many challenges, from creating jobs, to growing our economy, to lowering health care costs, to making sound investments in transportation and education. I look forward to being part of the solution.

This November, the policies which shape Virginia's future will be on the ballot.
Over the next five months, we will be taking our campaign to every corner of the Commonwealth and sharing our ideas for a better future here in Virginia. We are very excited for our strong Republican ticket and look forward to campaigning alongside Ed Gillespie for Governor and John Adams for Attorney General.

We are just getting started and we need your help to make this election cycle a success.
Would you help us launch our general election campaign by [making an online contribution right now of $5000, $1000, $250, $100, or even $25](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uMKeg4wRVdQAZxFfk9mKB9Izg6HR1Oa3NQpUm0n2YuJ4JgDwTV1REOklyqBF47mOFJ_gZR7Pg31Iq2SkIF-QMSrEUkSE1wJYHzQ8jhjntTDjxKxXSBUb6AVVhwuIbAdBuc0G84eYVqkX_5Q9PbtWM51MVAX_PCpvtoRZlxVEErLfjmJLTDN3x44eiszyCCYIhXenlW3OeUUiEc5-gqWG7v_bY45zf7GZaurdplI4wn0PWhcJEsWy3w==&c=_3Cn0FXKK7NH2EBPlisvn8IMb1ZZXxECqWY_yeWPBa_6o_fXIzTlMA==&ch=GunvepS-0-JEboBz_uAoWn7ihxM4Yj1K9Uj8IdWrpqggea1A1egZEA==)\- whatever you can - before our critical June 30th campaign finance deadline?
